ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF(AND( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Rate_Based_On__c, 'Rate') , OR( AND(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rate__c),ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rate_Precise__c), ISBLANK(leaseworks__Ratio_Table__c)), AND(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rate__c),ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rate_Precise__c), NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Ratio_Table__c)) ))), true, IF(AND( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Rate_Based_On__c, 'Ratio Table'), OR( AND( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rate__c),ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rate_Precise__c), ISBLANK(leaseworks__Ratio_Table__c) ), AND( OR(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rate__c)),NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Rate_Precise__c))), ISBLANK(leaseworks__Ratio_Table__c) ))), true, false) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide either a Rate or a Ratio Table for MR calculation based on the selected 'Rate Based On' option.
